statement: In every magma, Equation 2350 (`x = (y * (y * (z * x))) * w`) implies Equation 1375 (`x = y * (((z * y) * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0968
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z x))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) z) y))
